description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a light oak finish, featuring a spacious flat top surface suitable for writing or computer work. On the left side, there are two open shelves for storage, while the right side contains a vertical stack of three drawers with metallic handles. The desk includes a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface, supported by metal rods on the left for added stability. The back and right sides are enclosed, while the left side is partially open, revealing the shelving. The overall design is modern and functional, making it suitable for offices, home workspaces, or public study areas.
description: A light oak-finished desk with three drawers, two open shelves, and a pull-out keyboard tray, supported by metal rods for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelves on the left, the pull-out keyboard tray, and the open leg space beneath the desk.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the desk and the supporting metal rods.
description_view_2: Front view with three drawers and metallic handles on the right, the keyboard tray in the center, and the open shelves on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a solid wooden panel with no visible features or openings.
